examples: My definition revolves around the concept of "stickiness"—creations and experiences to which others adhere.
They have a pure taste and the quintessential stickiness.
The viscous term has to do with the stickiness of the medium.
If you look at those three, Apple I think is the weakest from a stickiness perspective.
It is not the technology underpinning Facebook that is differentiated here, but the stickiness with users.
